pass_context.rf03_definition: RF-03 flags: using scheduling, transportation, activities, or daily logistics as instruments of control, punishment, or leverage. Key indicators: last-minute changes designed to disrupt; activity enrollment conflicts; pickup/dropoff as confrontation; logistical compliance contingent on unrelated demands; strategic unavailability during other parent's time; over-scheduling; logistical obstacles (wrong location, changed times).

cross_rf_foundation.rf02_context: RF-02 pass complete (101 flags, 4 arcs). Gatekeeping and weaponized logistics share a boundary: RF-02 is about ACCESS denial; RF-03 is about PROCESS manipulation. Many RF-02 signals likely have RF-03 logistics components. Key RF-02 events to cross-check: cat allergy gatekeeping scheme (ADD-006 RF-15 + RF-02), visit refusal cascade B-028-B-031, required-intermediary pattern (64 signals).
cross_rf_foundation.rf04_context: RF-04 complete (93 flags). DARVO mechanism often includes logistical DARVO — Melissa creates impossible logistics then claims Eli is the obstructionist. COMP-RF04-028/029/030 are compound DARVO events that may have RF-03 components.
cross_rf_foundation.rf15_context: Cat allergy manufactured pretext (ADD-006): Melissa took Olivia to allergy specialist → documented cat allergy + asthma → used to deny visitation because Eli would not remove cats. This is RF-02 primary + RF-15 compound; watch for RF-03 logistics weaponization in the same cluster (B-025 area).
known_signal_areas: B-025 area (Jun 2025): cat allergy/asthma documentation weaponized as logistical gatekeeping pretext
Phase B/C visit refusal cascade: watch for logistical pretexts layered on top of RF-02 refusals
B-031 (Apr 12 2026): pickup context with bruise report — possible pickup confrontation staging
Hot periods per triage: 2025-05, 2024-08, 2025-10 — logistics escalation in Phase B

anticipated_arcs: ARC-RF03-001: Weaponized Scheduling Pattern — last-minute changes, logistical pretexts for access denial
ARC-RF03-002: Activity Enrollment Obstruction — enrolling Olivia in activities conflicting with Eli's time
not_this_boundaries: Legitimate activity enrollment with advance notice
RF-02 pure access denial without logistical manipulation element

calibration_episode.batch_tone: Cooperative baseline Jan-Oct 2022. Pre-escalation period. Logistics communication expected to be neutral and functional. No weaponized logistics anticipated. Triage shows RF-03 Phase A dominant (21/30 hits) but concentrated in later Phase A batches (B-006+). B-001 expected to be zero-flag baseline.
calibration_episode.reason_not_flagged: Jan-Oct 2022 is the cooperative pre-escalation baseline confirmed across all 10 Tier 1 passes. RF-03 triage signal is concentrated in later Phase A batches (hot periods 2024-08, 2025-05, 2025-10). Confirming zero RF-03 primary flags for B-001.

batch_summary.note: Jan-Oct 2022 calibration batch. Zero RF-03 primary flags. Cooperative baseline confirmed — logistics communication functional and non-strategic in pre-escalation period. RF-03 signal concentration expected in Phase A late (B-006+) and Phase B/C (B-025+) based on triage hot periods (2024-08, 2025-05, 2025-10). Arc ARC-RF03-001 and ARC-RF03-002 initialized at CANDIDATE.

arc_updates.event: Weaponized Scheduling arc initialized — B-001 baseline: cooperative logistics period, zero signals
Activity Enrollment Obstruction arc initialized — B-001 baseline: no activity enrollment conflicts documented
